title: Initiative Prioritization Matrix Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Initiative Prioritization Matrix skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

candidate_initiative_list.description: Candidate initiative list with brief descriptions and sponsoring business unit

strategic_objectives_okrs.description: Strategic objectives or OKRs against which initiatives will be scored for fit

estimated_effort_cost.description: Estimated effort or cost for each initiative (ranges are acceptable if point estimates are unavailable)

risk_assessment_dependency.description: Risk assessment or dependency flags for each initiative

capacity_data.description: Capacity data (FTE availability, budget envelopes) to apply as a constraint filter after scoring

historical_data_on.description: Historical data on initiative delivery performance to calibrate effort estimates
